title: Anthropic 'made a mistake' in Pentagon talks and should 'correct course,' FCC boss says
summary_full: In tense negotiations, Anthropic sought specific restrictions on the use of its AI technology by the Department of Defense, which the agency did not agree to.
summary_public: In tense negotiations, Anthropic sought specific restrictions on the use of its AI technology by the Department of Defense, which the agency did not agree to.
